violations.text: Eggs are served undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces need to be cleaned: 1) the ice machine was observed with biofilm 2) the heater under/behind the dry storage shelving was observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

The floors behind the dish machine, behind the chest freezer, and under the dry storage in the kitchen has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

A box of frozen raw chicken was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler directly on top of a box of oat milk. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food(s) during storage to prevent cross-contamination. Thawing Chicken was moved over a container of raw chicken at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Food contact surfaces of deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Deli Slicer was taken out of service for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Yogurt Parfaits were observed held at 44 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold hold display case at the time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Yogurt Parfaits were moved to the Walk-In Cooler at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
Boxes milk items and a container of raw chicken were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Rinsed noodles were observed draining over cleaned equipment/utensils in a drying rack at the 3 Bay Sink. Noodles were moved to draining into a pan. Clean equipment/utensils were put back in the 3 bay sink to be rewashed/rinsed/sanitized prior to use at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

Utensils used as scoops in dry ingredients were observed being stored with their handles in the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Utensils were repositioned for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The following equipment was observed to be in need of repair... - The Walk-In Refrigerator door gasket was observed to be torn and in poor repair. Gasket is to be replaced. - The handle to the hot water control at the faucet in the kitchen area was observed to be missing (Per the PIC, broken). Handle is to be replaced for access to hot water at the kitchen faucet. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to be in poor repair... - A patch created for the ceiling, after a previous repair in the kitchen area, is in poor repair and not properly cleanable (sagging). - Several floor tiles in the kitchen area are cracking/chipping - Built-in wooden shelving has a sealed coating that is chipping/flaking and in need of recoating The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
